rules.name: simple_small_context
rules.description: Simple tasks with small context → small models

rules.name: simple_large_context
rules.description: Simple tasks but large context → mid models for context window

rules.name: moderate_tasks
rules.description: Moderate complexity → mid-tier for combined steps and single reflection

rules.name: complex_tasks
rules.description: Complex tasks → high-tier for deep reasoning and multi-pass reflection

rules.name: low_confidence_escalation
rules.description: Previous pass had low confidence → escalate one tier

rules.name: reflection_required
rules.description: Task needs reflection → at least mid-tier
